column1: # WadsRadio station list: NPR program stream and major NPR member stations
# Columns: station name, stream URL, volume offset, stream type, logo URL
# WadsRadio supports direct streams and HLS .m3u8 streams; the optional fifth column points at a local or remote station logo.
# This is a practical NPR/member-station starter playlist, not every NPR affiliate.
# Checked but not included: WABE tested public StreamTheWorld URLs returned 403 or 404.
